nasb.text: You shall offer a burnt offering as a soothing aroma to the Lord: one bull, one ram, and seven male lambs one year old without defect;

esv.text: and you shall offer a burnt offering, for a pleasing aroma to the Lord: one bull from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without blemish;

cnv.text: 你們要把燔祭作馨香的祭獻給耶和華，就是一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔。

ccb.text: 你们要把馨香的燔祭献给耶和华，即毫无残疾的公牛犊一头、公绵羊一只和一岁的公羊羔七只；
